children.heading: Seal
children.label: a Seal
children.text: The Department shall have a seal, whose design is subject to the approval of the President.

children.heading: Participation of members of the Armed Forces
children.label: b Participation of members of the Armed Forces
children.text: With respect to the Department, the Secretary shall have the same authorities that the Secretary of Transportation has with respect to the Department of Transportation under .section 324 of title 49

children.heading: Redelegation of functions
children.label: c Redelegation of functions
children.text: Unless otherwise provided in the delegation or by law, any function delegated under this chapter may be redelegated to any subordinate.

children.heading: Investigation of certain violent acts, shootings, and mass killings
children.label: d Investigation of certain violent acts, shootings, and mass killings

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: At the request of an appropriate law enforcement official of a State or political subdivision, the Secretary, through deployment of the Secret Service or United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement, may assist in the investigation of violent acts and shootings occurring in a place of public use, and in the investigation of mass killings and attempted mass killings. Any assistance provided by the Secretary under this subsection shall be presumed to be within the scope of Federal office or employment.

children.label: A
children.text: the term “mass killings” means 3 or more killings in a single incident; and

children.label: B
children.text: the term “place of public use” has the meaning given that term under .section 2332f(e)(6) of title 18
